creator: bz@FreeBSD.org
text:
After 115 days of uptime on the test machine I got the problem too.

dpni though it was up;

dev.dpaa2_ni.3.link: 
Link State: UP (IGNORE)
Link Rate: 0
Link Options: 0
Link Speed Capabilities: 000000000000000000
Link Speed Advertised for autoneg: 000000000000000000


changing media options did not help either;  I had to down and up the interface.

This time no logging about any interrupts but that machine does not have the "log it all under bootverbose" change yet so possibly there were some we missed.
